zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Pakenham於1435年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾時，他的父親Hugh Pakenham ,Sheriff Of Wiltshire25歲，母親Constance de la Hay27歲。他於大約1465年與Margaret Bramshott在英國波克夏結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1485年10月1日在英國波克夏分哈普斯亞德享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Pakenham于1435年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Hugh Pakenham ,Sheriff Of Wiltshire25岁，母亲Constance de la Hay27岁。他于大约1465年与Margaret Bramshott在英国波克夏结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1485年10月1日在英国波克夏分哈普斯亞德享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pakenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pakenham (Suffolk). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Pacca (genitive Paccan) + hām ‘village, homestead’.
History: A family of this name has been established in Westmeath, Ireland, since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Pakenham was born in 1435, in Leicestershire, England, his father, Hugh Pakenham ,Sheriff Of Wiltshire, was 25 and his mother, Constance de la Hay, was 27. He married Margaret Bramshott about 1465, in Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 1 October 1485, in Finchampstead, Berkshire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.Hartley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: Hartley by Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Pakenham est né en 1435, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Pakenham ,Sheriff Of Wiltshire, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Constance de la Hay, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Bramshott environ 1465, à Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 1 octobre 1485, à Finchampstead, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Pakenham 1435 in Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Pakenham ,Sheriff Of Wiltshire 25 und seine Mutter Constance de la Hay 27. Er hat um 1465 in Berkshire, England Margaret Bramshott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Oktober 1485 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Finchampstead, Berkshire, England.

Lui sposato Margaret Bramshott circa 1465, nel Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 ottobre 1485, nel Finchampstead, Berkshire, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Pakenhamが1435年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hugh Pakenham ,Sheriff Of Wiltshireは25歳，母Constance de la Hayは27歳であった。約1465年にイギリスバークシュアイアでMargaret Bramshottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1485年10月1日にイギリスバークシュアイアフィンチャンプステアドで50歳で死去した。

ko.Hartley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 하틀리 비 크랜브룩
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Pakenham(이)가 1435년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Pakenham ,Sheriff Of Wiltshire(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance de la Hay(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1465년 영국 버크실르에서 Margaret Bramshott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년 10월 1일 영국 버크실르 핑챔프스테아드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Pakenham nasceu em 1435, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Pakenham ,Sheriff Of Wiltshire, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Constance de la Hay, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Bramshott aproximadamente 1465, em Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de outubro de 1485, em Finchampstead, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.Hartley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: хартли би кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Pakenham родился в 1435 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Pakenham ,Sheriff Of Wiltshire было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance de la Hay, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Bramshott около 1465 г. в местности биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 1 октября 1485 г. в местности финчампстид, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.

Se casó con Margaret Bramshott aproximadamente 1465, en Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas.
